content.text: TipIf you’re hardcore, you can take the opposite approach -- put all content that isn’t explicitly meant to be exported/external in an unnamed namespace.
If you’re hardcore, you can take the opposite approach -- put all content that isn’t explicitly meant to be exported/external in an unnamed namespace.
Best practicePrefer unnamed namespaces when you have content you want to keep local to a translation unit.Avoid unnamed namespaces in header files.

Avoid unnamed namespaces in header files.
